themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents that can autonomously perform research tasks, including publishing and reviewing findings.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content focused on AI tools that assist developers with writing, reviewing, and analyzing code.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles about AI-powered platforms and tools specifically designed to aid in various research activities.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Content related to AI's ability to condense large amounts of text, such as meeting notes or research papers, into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Articles exploring how AI is affecting job roles, skills, and the overall labor market, often through research studies.

themes.name: AI-powered data analysis
themes.description: Discussions on using AI for analyzing data, extracting insights, and driving business intelligence.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Articles focusing on the creation and detection of AI-generated voices, avatars, and content that mimics human users.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Content exploring how AI tools and techniques are being applied to enhance design processes and research methodologies.

themes.name: AI research platform
themes.description: Articles introducing or discussing platforms specifically built for AI research, development, and deployment.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Discussions on using AI to automate or enhance usability testing processes for digital products.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
